name: grwm
description: GRWM monorepo foundation for a global AI fashion styling platform.

scripts.test:firestore-rules: firebase emulators:exec --config firebase/firebase.test.json --project demo-grwm-rules --only firestore "node --test firebase/tests/firestore.rules.test.ts"
scripts.test:storage-rules: firebase emulators:exec --config firebase/firebase.test.json --project demo-grwm-rules --only storage "node --test firebase/tests/storage.rules.test.ts"
scripts.test:firebase-rules: firebase emulators:exec --config firebase/firebase.test.json --project demo-grwm-rules --only firestore,storage "node --test --test-concurrency=1 firebase/tests/*.rules.test.ts"
